summary: Iteration 53 - Complete testing of Stripe removal, Customer Casefile API/UI, Direct Email, and Note functionality. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Kunden tab shows 61 customers, casefile opens with 8 tabs (Übersicht, Anfragen, Angebote, Rechnungen, Verträge, E-Mail, Notizen, Aktivität), stat bar displays correctly, E-Mail and Notizen tabs functional. Monitoring view shows only Revolut (no Stripe).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53 verified: 1) Stripe completely removed from backend and frontend - only Revolut shown in monitoring. 2) Customer casefile API (/api/admin/customers/{email}/casefile) returns full data with stats, leads, bookings, quotes, invoices, contracts, emails_sent, timeline. 3) Direct email sending via /api/admin/email/send works with SMTP. 4) Customer note functionality via /api/admin/customers/{email}/note works (fixed string-to-array migration issue). 5) Frontend Kunden tab shows 61 customers, casefile UI has 8 tabs with stat bar.

frontend_ui_tests: Customer row click opens casefile - PASSED
Casefile stat bar shows 6 metrics - PASSED
E-Mail tab has send form - PASSED
Notizen tab has add note form - PASSED
Monitoring view shows Revolut only (no Stripe) - PASSED

bug_fix_applied.issue: MongoDB WriteError when notes field was string instead of array
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added migration logic to convert string notes to array format before $push operation
